nasb.text: Who also brings me out from my enemies; You even lift me above those who rise up against me; You rescue me from the violent man.

esv.text: who brought me out from my enemies; you exalted me above those who rose against me; you delivered me from men of violence.

cnv.text: 他救我脫離我的仇敵。 你還把我高舉起來，高過那些起來攻擊我的人， 又救我脫離了強暴的人。

ccb.text: 祂救我脱离仇敌， 使我胜过强敌， 救我脱离残暴之徒。
